changes_from_v_06: var declarations unified to const/let throughout app.js (ES2015+, consistent with Map/Set/async already in use)
All constants moved to top of IIFE: FIELD_MIN_CHARS, URL_TABLES_PARAM, URL_STATE_PARAM
createEl rewritten using rest params and for-of loops instead of arguments[]
btnCopyDP/btnDownloadDP case inconsistency in resetDatapackagePanel fixed — now uses cached btnCopyDp/btnDownloadDp
dpSelectedRequiredOnlyCheckbox event listener changed from .onchange= to .addEventListener for consistency
graphPanel.style.display='block' moved inside the visibleNodeCount>0 branch so the graph container stays hidden until there is content
Duplicate scroll-margin-top rule in styles.css removed
Duplicate #graphPanel .panel-head h2 rule in styles.css consolidated
Inline styles in index.html header extracted into CSS classes: .header-row, .header-actions, .header-version
Inline style on #linkNotice margin/border-left extracted into CSS class .link-notice-panel
Whitespace and indentation normalised throughout app.js
CIRCLE_LAYOUT constant introduced to avoid repeating the layout config object
h1 margin:0 inline style removed (h1 CSS rule already sets margin to 0)
